exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as down_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" = "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flat_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') AND "Date" LIKE '2018-%' GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as down_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" = "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flat_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') AND "Date" LIKE '2018-%' GROUP BY "Index";

result.preview:
"The North American indices with more up days than down days in 2018 were:

- IXIC (NASDAQ Composite): 44 up days, 31 down days
- GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite): 44 up days, 41 down days"

args.answer:

- GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite): 44 up days, 41 down days
